subject: Cleanup project's name in Sonar
commit_message:
Cleanup project's name in Sonar

The name parameter in the root pom.xml should
match the project name in gerrit to reflect consistency
in Sonar.

Change-Id: I5aad10d9c305c9c43adbeede50fc75cd1fa750e0
Issue-id: CIMAN-65
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/demo-master-verify-java/278/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/demo-master-verify-java/278

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi Jess,

Two things:
1) The demo project shouldn't be in Sonar. We requested to be excluded from that because Demo contains use cases and not ONAP components;
2) Renaming the artifact Id in the master pom is not enough. Other poms are using it, please see below

pom.xml:  <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
pom.xml:  <name>demo-aggregator</name>
vnfs/honeycomb_plugin/sample_plugin/parent-pom/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/vCPE/kea-sdnc-notify-mod/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/VES/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/VESreporting_vFW/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/VESreporting_vFW5.0/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/VESreporting_vLB/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/VESreporting_vLB5.0/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/vFW/pg_streams/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/vLB/dns_streams/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/vLB/DNSClient/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
vnfs/vLB/DNSManager/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>

Thanks,
Marco

Patch Set 1:

> Hi Jess,
 > 
 > Two things:
 > 1) The demo project shouldn't be in Sonar. We requested to be
 > excluded from that because Demo contains use cases and not ONAP
 > components;
 > 2) Renaming the artifact Id in the master pom is not enough. Other
 > poms are using it, please see below
 > 
 > pom.xml:  <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > pom.xml:  <name>demo-aggregator</name>
 > vnfs/honeycomb_plugin/sample_plugin/parent-pom/pom.xml:   
 > <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/vCPE/kea-sdnc-notify-mod/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/VES/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/VESreporting_vFW/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/VESreporting_vFW5.0/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/VESreporting_vLB/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/VESreporting_vLB5.0/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/vFW/pg_streams/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/vLB/dns_streams/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/vLB/DNSClient/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > vnfs/vLB/DNSManager/pom.xml:    <artifactId>demo-aggregator</artifactId>
 > 
 > Thanks,
 > Marco

Marco, the maven project name is different than the artifact ID and has no effect on dependencies. Also to keep your project from sonar runs you need to update your pom to skip sonar-maven-plugin runs. I think the effect of this patch is minimal on current functionality and considering the fact that sonar is currently running for demo (https://sonar.onap.org/overview?id=42163) seems reasonable until you update your pom to skip sonar. I'd counsel standardization even if you do so. Just my two cents.

Patch Set 1:

Hi Marcus,
My bad. For some reason I thought that both artifact-id and project-name were changed in the main POM. Please disregard my comment. Thanks for the tips about skipping SONAR runs. I wasn't aware of the plugin.
Marco
Change has been successfully merged by Marco Platania
